comment.body:
Curious if we could get a poll with folks portfolio positioning

How are you positioned this week vs how are you positioned the weeks after to April OPEX?

I’d be guessing all of us are considering possibility of a bull trap (move higher). But also left tail skew this week per Alma’s weekly post is very under estimated. And this week is loaded with tariff-gedden and Friday NFP. 

Seems like we have a true binary event week to me. With equal chances we go lower vs go higher. 

For me this week I’m staying the course. Most of my holdings are in energy stocks, REITs, basic materials, and bonds. Stick with what’s working until I see those start to break down too. Then head to money market and wait for the ultimate q3 bottom
